choices.text: Front-end (features: visual keypoints / LiDAR edges) + back-end (pose graph optimization via g2o/GTSAM/Ceres) + loop closure (revisit detection corrects drift). Modern: Cartographer, ORB-SLAM3, SLAM Toolbox.

Loop closure: detect revisited places via feature matching → add graph constraint → optimization redistributes error globally. Map snaps back to consistent geometry. Critical for long-term SLAM accuracy.
